jd_text: Act as Technical Authority with corporate accountability for technical delivery across Electrical Engineering disciplines. Support Director - EPC Engineering (Hull & Marine) on strategy stewardship on capability development, sustainment and industry engagements. Day-to-day operations: Manage technical stewardship and due diligence of project deliverables for Electrical engineering discipline and interface with counterparts across Floater and Topside Facilities disciplines. Provide support to EPC functional and business leadership on market developments, competitor assessment, corporate business strategy developments. Support leadership team on career path development and sustainment for discipline members on functional and project delivery roles. Ownership on specific Management of Change procedures for respective disciplines on large capital projects. Steward quality assurance and Management of Change procedures on Electrical engineering discipline. Key Competencies Experience within the offshore Oil & Gas sector, particularly within FSO, FPSO, drilling units, semi-submersibles, FSRU projects. Experience in developing high-standard electrical solutions, including single-line diagrams (SLD), load lists, cable schedules, grounding, and equipment specifications (switchboards, transformers, UPS). Practical experience as a Package Engineer, leading multidisciplinary teams, providing technical support, and ensuring project integrity. Knowledge of international standards (IEC, IEEE), regulations, and class rules. Experience in preparing technical reports, specifications, calculations (load flow, short circuits), and reviewing vendor documents (FAT/SAT). Good knowledge of LV/HV systems and relevant standards. Experience in Functional Safety (IEC 61511). CAE Skills Working experience with Microsoft platforms such as SharePoint, OneDrive and Office suite. Hands-on experience with 2D drafting tools such as AutoCAD or similar, 3D modelling environment such as AVEVA E3D or similar, NURBS modelling tools such as Rhinoceros 3D or similar. Expertise in using design tool such as ETAP, AGi32 or equivalent. Preferable to have experience with developing workflow automation tools using Excel VBA Macros / Python or equivalent scripting frameworks. Behavioral Competencies: Strategic Planning and organizing skills Accountability, Adaptability and Ownership Advanced Inter-personnel Communication Advanced Decision-making skills Mentoring, Team building and motivation Cross-functional Collaboration and Resilient Mindset Conflict Management and Resolution Oriented Problem Solving Team and Stakeholder Performance Management Business Acumen and Drive Initiatives Education Bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering Master’s degree in electrical engineering Experience Minimum cumulative experience 10+ years of experience as Principal Engineer in two or more of the following industry players: (1) Tier – I EPCIC Turnkey Services and Contractor Organizations as Principal and Subject Matter Expert roles. (2) Specialists’ offshore floater / subsea engineering service providers with track record on floater / mooring system concept definition to construction follow up / handover phase ownership. (3) Offshore Production Units Lease-Own-Operate organizations. Functional membership in industrial networks such as IEEE / IMAREST and similar organizations. Strong network with OEMs and engineering service industry.
